MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arnold Evje, Esq., for plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation with manager Andre Nelson. Richard J. McPalmer, Esq. limited scope attorney appeared for defendant Gerri Tarriel who is also present.
